r1_blocker_summary.decision: reuse and generalize the #509 primitive instead of adding a new primitive

accepted_change.shape: DomainEvidence on an admitted LibraryApi call node, dependency-backed by the exact LibraryApi evidence record and emitted only for fixed safe result-domain rows
consumers: strict exact receiver-domain consumers through existing indexes
hard_negative_boundary: record arity must match actual call arity
API evidence must be admitted for the current call shape
HOF compatibility fallback is not emitted as call-node DomainEvidence
Map.get value domain is not emitted
ambiguous Java Arrays.asList single-argument result shape is not emitted

centralized_paths: receiver-method result-domain direct emission replaced by the shared materializer
Rust Option Some direct call emission replaced by the shared materializer
registry fixed-domain lookup now reuses the materialized-result-domain helper
compatibility_lanes_kept_separate: MethodCall(HoF(_)) remains available only to existing protocol compatibility lookup
fixed result-domain materialization excludes HOF rows

blocker_taxonomy_v3.rationale: many builtin families already produce admitted API occurrence evidence with fixed result domains; the kernel needed one shared materializer rather than family-specific domain emission
the builtin kernel can materialize known fixed-domain rows, but external packs still lack executable result-domain authoring support
package/version occurrence proof is still a prerequisite for external ecosystem rows
caller-selected materialization and dtype-domain producers cannot be replaced by fixed API result-domain evidence
the shared materializer must not turn compatibility shortcuts or parametric value domains into emitted exact evidence

criteria_met: new primitive additions stayed at zero in this cycle
existing primitive composition explained most accepted rows
the same primitive vocabulary is reused across multiple languages
criteria_not_met: external pack authorability of fixed result-domain rows is still untested
remaining blocker packet still contains package/version, trait/materialization, and dtype proof gaps
only one post-#509 R1-R3 cycle has completed
transition_assessment.next_cycle_goal: choose the next 20-row packet from remaining package/version, trait/materialization, and external-authoring blockers before deciding whether R4 must start early

product_output_gate.command: target/issue511/base-target/release/nose query <repo> --mode semantic --format json compared with target/release/nose query <repo> --mode semantic --format json, scrubbed of volatile timing fields
product_output_gate.classification: no product-output drift on the focused semantic-query subset

performance_gate.limit: no more than 10% median runtime regression
performance_gate.expected_hot_path_change: one indexed same-span scan per call plus admitted-record validation only when no domain evidence already depends on that API record

measurements.name: focused semantic query subset warmed alternating r15
boltons focused semantic query warmed r15
serde_json focused semantic query warmed r15
junit5 focused semantic query warmed r15
